items.name_en: 5BG306, Miu Miu new tassel drawstring dumpling bag. Imported lambskin with vintage gold hardware. The drawstring closure features fine, dense pleats that look like ruffles, adding a three-dimensional and playful touch. Long dual handles allow for shoulder or hand carrying, or holding it casually at the waist, creating a lazy, casual vibe. Stylish and versatile, perfect for daily outings or commuting.
